title: You Died! (Reborn)
description: Fork of "You Died" for new versions & translations
body:
# You Died! (Reborn)

This mod is a fork of [You Died](https://modrinth.com/mod/you-died) updated for new versions & almost 20 new languages
![You Died animation in Spanish](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcHFxd3N2ejB6MTh4eGpsZHhvbzZsZDlwcXM3MW4zazhtOTJoa3lwbiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/RXZ7PIWlFW5XtTzrfU/giphy.gif)

If you need an **specific version**, just contact me through: https://javivi.dev

**You can use this mod completely for modpacks without authorisation as the original creator said ❤️**
